customAttributes.description: When Exchange of Words enters the battlefield, choose two target creatures. For as long as Exchange of Words remains on the battlefield, exchange the text boxes of those creatures.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Before criticizing, walk a mile (about 1.6 kilometers) in their head. That way, when you do, you’re a mile away and you have their head.
